unhostedWallets.notes: FINMA requires proof of wallet ownership (e.g., Satoshi Test, signed message/AOPP) for transfers to/from unhosted wallets. For customer's own wallets: ownership verification required. For third-party wallets: full identity verification of the third party plus proof of wallet control.

rules.notes: FINMA Guidance 02/2019 requires travel rule compliance for ALL VASP-to-VASP transactions with no de minimis threshold. One of the strictest regimes globally. AMLO-FINMA amendment (February 2020) lowered customer identification threshold from CHF 5,000 to CHF 1,000. The CHF 1,000 threshold applies to unhosted wallet verification, not the travel rule trigger.
